sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105251" key="trisne/atos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρισ-νέᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:134" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">134</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεάτη, παρανήτη.</foreign> </entryFree>
